scripts.build: cp README.md packages/react-grab/README.md && turbo run build --filter=@react-grab/cli --filter=react-grab --filter=grab
scripts.build:fixtures: pnpm --filter @react-grab/e2e-app-vite build && pnpm --filter @react-grab/e2e-app-vite-upstream build && pnpm --filter @react-grab/e2e-app-next build:production-test && pnpm --filter @react-grab/e2e-app-tanstack-start build
scripts.typecheck:fixtures: pnpm --filter @react-grab/e2e-app-vite typecheck && pnpm --filter @react-grab/e2e-app-vite-upstream typecheck && pnpm --filter @react-grab/e2e-app-next typecheck && pnpm --filter @react-grab/e2e-app-tanstack-start typecheck
scripts.release: pnpm check:provenance && pnpm build && changeset publish
